name: Symphony Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small dish, stir together the mustard, mayonnaise, and garlic powder.
2. If using the avocado, cut it in half and twist to remove the seed. Reserve one half for another use. Cut the remaining half into quarters. Peel the skin away from the flesh, then slice each piece into four slices. Set aside.
3. Slice the unpeeled tomato and set aside.
4. Microwave one tortilla for 30 seconds, uncovered, on high. Spread half the mustard mixture over the entire tortilla surface. In the center of the tortilla, leaving a 1/2-inch edge, place two slices of cheese, half each of the turkey, avocado (if using), tomato, carrots, and sprouts.
5. Fold in the sides and roll it up burrito-style.
6. Repeat the process to make the second sandwich.
7. Cut the sandwiches in half and wrap each half in foil. Serve at once or refrigerate until ready to serve.
